instruction: The codepen icon has two problems: it's been tinted blue AND the canvas is clipping it (96x80). Restore both the color and the viewBox.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 80" width="96" height="80">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="96" height="80" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/codepen.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #3b82f6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polygon points="12 2 22 8.5 22 15.5 12 22 2 15.5 2 8.5 12 2"/><line x1="12" y1="22" x2="12" y2="15.5"/><polyline points="22 8.5 12 15.5 2 8.5"/><polyline points="2 15.5 12 8.5 22 15.5"/><line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="8.5"/></g>
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/codepen.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><polygon points="12 2 22 8.5 22 15.5 12 22 2 15.5 2 8.5 12 2"/><line x1="12" y1="22" x2="12" y2="15.5"/><polyline points="22 8.5 12 15.5 2 8.5"/><polyline points="2 15.5 12 8.5 22 15.5"/><line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="8.5"/></g>
</svg>
